title: How to build reliable software with AI agents
summary: A video discussion examining whether AI-powered coding agents reduce technical debt or increase maintenance burden. The speakers argue that human-in-the-loop verification, rigorous code review, and strong engineering practices are essential to ensure AI agents improve quality rather than just accelerate output.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech discussion examines whether AI-powered coding agents reduce technical debt or add to maintenance burden. The speakers argue that human-in-the-loop verification, rigorous code review, and strong engineering practices are what determine whether agents improve quality or merely accelerate output. The takeaway: agent-generated code needs the same testing and review discipline as any other code, and faster generation does not substitute for sound engineering.
